criteria.criterion: `src/rebar/llm/usage_log.py` exists exposing `record(usage, *, op)` and `summarize(path)` with the semantics above; verified by `pytest tests/unit/test_usage_log.py` passing.
With `REBAR_USAGE_LOG` unset, `record(...)` writes no file and the runner path is unchanged; verified by the no-op unit test.
`PydanticAIRunner.run` appends a usage record when `REBAR_USAGE_LOG` is set; verified by the FunctionModel-override unit test asserting a JSONL line was written.
`python -m rebar.llm.usage_log summarize <path>` prints the Markdown totals + per-op table (or `No LLM calls recorded.` for an empty/missing file); verified by the CLI test.

The `eval-live` job (`prompt-eval.yml`) and the `external` job (`external-integration.yml`) each set `REBAR_USAGE_LOG`, append `summarize` output to `$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY` (`if: always()`), and upload the JSONL as an artifact.

citation.description: Ticket comment attests Gerrit #942 patch set 2 received LLM-Review +1 (rebar review bot) and Verified +1 (rebar CI bot), merged as commit 8e4d6a46d076bd496c797523abfc24b4491722d0. All deliverable code is present in the repo confirming the local gates sub-criterion. The Gerrit vote attestation names specific actors, vote types, and a commit SHA.

criteria.criterion: `make test`, `make lint`, and `make typecheck` all pass locally; the change lands via Gerrit with `Verified +1` and `LLM-Review +1`.
